location_precision.why: Every one of the seven findings carries a usable file:line reference (e.g. 'src/sync.py:31', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: The line 31 finding gestures at an interaction by noting a user 'whose UPDATE raises is still marked as seen and will never be retried,' but never mechanistically ties this to the line 38 'except Exception: pass' swallow that would together cause silent permanent data loss.

causal_clarity.why: Essentially every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. mutable default 'shared across calls, causing users synced in a previous invocation to be silently skipped' and early return 'never closes the opened file handle, leaking it.'
